description_long: Three glass beer bottles are shown, each with a distinct coloration: one is brown, one is clear with a yellowish liquid, and one is green. All bottles are covered in visible condensation droplets, giving them a cold, freshly-chilled appearance. The front labels are prominently displayed, featuring bold black and gold typography with a classic, minimalistic design. The bottles have crown-style metal caps, each matching the color of the bottle. The glass surfaces are slightly textured with water droplets, and the labels are rectangular with a dark background and contrasting text. The overall look is realistic, with attention to the details of condensation, label wear, and glass coloration.
description: Three condensation-covered glass beer bottles in brown, clear, and green, each with a bold, dark label and crown cap. The labels feature classic typography and the bottles appear cold and freshly served.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bottles with their labels and condensation clearly visible; label details and bottle colors are most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the green bottle, with the other two bottles partially obscured behind it; label is only partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view of the three bottles, highlighting the colored glass and condensation, with no labels visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the brown bottle, with the other two bottles partially obscured behind it; label is only partially visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features bold, serif typography in black and gold on a dark background, with a clean, minimalistic layout. The design is classic and uncluttered, emphasizing readability and a premium feel.
